canteens.name: Central Library Xerox Shop
canteens.description: Campus printing and xerox centre. B&W and colour printing, binding, lamination, and document scanning services.

menu.description: Standard A4 black and white laser printing.

menu.description: Full-colour A4 inkjet printing.

menu.description: Spiral-bound document with hard cover.

menu.description: High-res scan to PDF or JPG format.

menu.description: Standard A4 photocopy from original document.

menu.description: High-quality A4 resume printing on premium paper.
